/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_acs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_bot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_fixed_t.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_mapinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_tnl_packets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_video.cpp.o -o run_tests  -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDLmain -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL
